name: io.github.anish632/ground-truth
title: Ground Truth
description: Start with one free MCP tool call: use check_endpoint to verify a public URL responds, then use paid tools for pricing, claims, compliance, markets, and competitors.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Optional team-plan API key. Leave this empty for the first free tool call with check_endpoint or inspect_security_headers. Add it only for team-plan paid tools; paid tools can also use x402/xpay pay-per-use.
